steps.title: Connect zeros to intercepts
steps.content: The equation $f(x)=0$ asks for the $x$-values where the graph has height $0$, which are the $x$-intercepts.

steps.title: Count the crossings
steps.content: The graph crosses the $x$-axis three times, so there are three values of $x$ for which $f(x)=0$. The answer is C.
